defmodule CaravelaDemo.Library.Book do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.schema CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.
  Custom code placed below the `# --- CUSTOM ---` marker is preserved.
  """
  use Ecto.Schema
  import Ecto.Changeset

  @primary_key {:id, :binary_id, autogenerate: true}
  @foreign_key_type :binary_id

  schema "library_books" do
    field :title, :string
    field :isbn, :string
    field :published, :boolean, default: false
    field :price, :decimal
    belongs_to :author, CaravelaDemo.Library.Author
    belongs_to :publisher, CaravelaDemo.Library.Publisher

    timestamps(type: :utc_datetime)
  end

  @required_fields [:title]
  @optional_fields [:isbn, :published, :price, :author_id, :publisher_id]

  @doc false
  def changeset(entity, attrs) do
    entity
    |> cast(attrs, @required_fields ++ @optional_fields)
    |> validate_required(@required_fields)
    |> validate_length(:title, min: 3)
    |> validate_format(:isbn, ~r/^\d{13}$/)
    |> foreign_key_constraint(:author_id)
    |> foreign_key_constraint(:publisher_id)
  end

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end

defmodule Caravela.Migrations.Library.Create do
  use Ecto.Migration

  def change do
    create table(:library_publishers, primary_key: false) do
      add :id, :binary_id, primary_key: true
      add :name, :string, null: false
      add :country, :string

      timestamps(type: :utc_datetime)
    end

    create table(:library_authors, primary_key: false) do
      add :id, :binary_id, primary_key: true
      add :name, :string, null: false
      add :bio, :text
      add :born, :date

      timestamps(type: :utc_datetime)
    end

    create table(:library_books, primary_key: false) do
      add :id, :binary_id, primary_key: true
      add :title, :string, null: false
      add :isbn, :string
      add :published, :boolean, default: false
      add :price, :decimal, precision: 10, scale: 2
      add :author_id, references(:library_authors, type: :binary_id, on_delete: :nilify_all)

      add :publisher_id, references(:library_publishers, type: :binary_id, on_delete: :nilify_all)

      timestamps(type: :utc_datetime)
    end

    create index(:library_books, [:author_id])
    create index(:library_books, [:publisher_id])
  end
end
